description: An auditor reviews the process for handling reports made to the company's ethics hotline.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the log of all cases reported to the ethics hotline in the past year.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor has the case management log.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of cases to review.

expected_outcome.value: A sample is selected for testing.

nodes.task_description: For each sampled case, review the investigation file to ensure that the issue was investigated thoroughly, documented properly, and resolved in a timely manner.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms that all sampled cases were handled in accordance with the investigation protocol.
